full_text:
Taishi Ci (Ziyi) 太史慈 (子義)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Taishi Ci (太史慈), styledZiyi (子義), was born in Huang County, Dong Lai (Presently Dong Lai in Shan Dong Province). Served Liu Yao, then Wu. Helped save Kong Rong from the Yellow Scarves. Taishi Ci was affiliated with Gongsun Du, Liu Yao, and the Wu Kingdom. Taishi Ci lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
